overview: The system is a two-component architecture: a Go REST API (task-api) backed by an embedded SQLite database, and a React SPA (task-ui) served via Nginx. The frontend communicates with the backend over HTTP REST, and both services run as Docker containers on Kubernetes. All task data — titles, due dates, categories, and completion state — is persisted and managed exclusively through the task-api.
requirements: Users can create a task with a required title, an optional due date (YYYY-MM-DD), and an optional category string.
Users can view all their tasks in a single list, filterable by category and completion status.
Users can mark a task as complete or incomplete via a toggle action.
Users can edit a task's title, due date, and category.
Users can delete a task; deletion requires confirmation before proceeding.
Overdue tasks (due date before today) are visually highlighted in the UI.
The API persists all task data in a durable SQLite database.
The API returns appropriate 4xx errors for invalid input (missing title) and missing resources (task not found).
Both services expose a /health endpoint returning HTTP 200.
The frontend reads the backend base URL from the VITE_API_URL environment variable at build time.
CORS is fully enabled on the API to allow browser-based requests from any origin.

components.name: task-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Task API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: CRUD API for personal task management
servers:
  - url: http://task-api:9090
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                    example: ok
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List all tasks
      operationId: listTasks
      parameters:
        - name: category
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Filter tasks by category
        - name: completed
          in: query
          required: false
          schema:
            type: boolean
          description: Filter tasks by completion status
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of tasks
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
    post:
      summary: Create a new task
      operationId: createTask
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Task created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Invalid input
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Get a task by ID
      operationId: getTask
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task found
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '404':
          description: Task not found
    put:
      summary: Update a task
      operationId: updateTask
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          description: Invalid input
        '404':
          description: Task not found
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      operationId: deleteTask
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Task deleted
        '404':
          description: Task not found
  /tasks/{id}/complete:
    patch:
      summary: Toggle task completion status
      operationId: toggleTaskComplete
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - completed
              properties:
                completed:
                  type: boolean
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Completion status updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '404':
          description: Task not found
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List all distinct categories in use
      operationId: listCategories
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of category strings
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: string
components:
  schemas:
    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        title:
          type: string
        completed:
          type: boolean
        dueDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
        category:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    TaskInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - title
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
          maxLength: 255
        dueDate:
          type: string
          format: date
          nullable: true
        category:
          type: string
          nullable: true
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Build a RESTful Go backend using net/http (no external router required, but gorilla/mux is acceptable). Listen on port 9090.

## Data Storage
Use an embedded SQLite database (via `github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3`) stored at `/data/tasks.db`. On startup, auto-migrate the `tasks` table:
```sql
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  completed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  due_date TEXT,
  category TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL
);
```

## Endpoints
Implement all endpoints defined in the OpenAPI spec:
- `GET /health` — return `{"status":"ok"}` with 200.
- `GET /tasks` — list tasks; support optional query params `category` (string filter) and `completed` (bool filter). Return JSON array.
- `POST /tasks` — create task; validate `title` is non-empty and ≤255 chars; generate UUID for `id`; set `createdAt`/`updatedAt` to now; `completed` defaults to false.
- `GET /tasks/{id}` — return single task or 404.
- `PUT /tasks/{id}` — full update of title, dueDate, category; update `updatedAt`; return updated task or 404.
- `DELETE /tasks/{id}` — delete task; return 204 or 404.
- `PATCH /tasks/{id}/complete` — set `completed` field; update `updatedAt`; return updated task or 404.
- `GET /categories` — return a distinct sorted list of non-null category strings from the tasks table.

## CORS
Allow all origins (`*`) with headers `Content-Type` and methods `GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS`. Handle preflight OPTIONS requests.

## Error Responses
Return JSON error objects: `{"error": "message"}` with appropriate HTTP status codes.

## Dockerfile
Use a multi-stage build:
1. Builder stage: `golang:1.22-alpine`, install `gcc` and `musl-dev` (needed for cgo/sqlite3), copy source, run `go mod download && go build -o /app/server .`
2. Final stage: `alpine:3.19`, copy binary and set `WORKDIR /app`. Create `/data` directory. Expose port 9090. CMD `["/app/server"]`.

## Environment Variables
- `PORT` — default `9090`
- `DB_PATH` — default `/data/tasks.db`

## Edge Cases
- If task not found for GET/PUT/DELETE/PATCH, return 404 with `{"error":"task not found"}`.
- If `title` is missing or empty in POST/PUT, return 400 with `{"error":"title is required"}`.
- IDs are UUIDs generated server-side (use `github.com/google/uuid`).
- `dueDate` stored as TEXT in format `YYYY-MM-DD`; accept null/empty to clear it.
- All timestamps in UTC ISO 8601.

components.name: task-ui
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Task UI
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Static SPA served by Nginx — no runtime API endpoints.
servers:
  - url: http://task-ui:3000
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check (served by Nginx)
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: UI is healthy
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Build a single-page React 18 application using TypeScript and Vite. Serve via Nginx on port 3000.

## Tech Stack
- React 18 + TypeScript
- Vite for build tooling
- Axios for HTTP calls
- Tailwind CSS for styling

## Environment / API Base URL
Read the backend URL from the environment variable `VITE_API_URL` (default: `http://localhost:9090`). Use this as the base for all API calls.

## Pages & Features
Single-page app — no routing needed.

### Task List View (main/only view)
- Header bar with app title "My Tasks".
- Filter bar with:
  - Dropdown to filter by category (populated from `GET /categories`; includes an "All Categories" option).
  - Toggle buttons or tabs: All / Incomplete / Complete (maps to `completed` query param).
- Task list: renders each task as a card/row showing:
  - Checkbox to toggle completion (`PATCH /tasks/{id}/complete`).
  - Title (strikethrough if completed).
  - Category badge (if set).
  - Due date label (if set); highlight overdue tasks (dueDate < today) in red.
  - Edit button (opens inline edit form or modal).
  - Delete button (calls `DELETE /tasks/{id}` with confirmation dialog).
- Add Task form at the top or bottom:
  - Text input for title (required).
  - Date picker for due date (optional).
  - Text input for category (optional).
  - Submit button "Add Task" calls `POST /tasks`.
- Empty state message when no tasks match filters.

### Edit Modal/Inline Form
- Opens when user clicks Edit on a task.
- Prefilled with current title, dueDate, category.
- Save calls `PUT /tasks/{id}`; Cancel dismisses without saving.

## State Management
Use React `useState` + `useEffect`. Refresh the task list after every mutation (create, update, delete, toggle).

## Error Handling
Show a dismissible error banner at the top of the page for API failures.

## Dockerfile
Multi-stage:
1. Builder: `node:20-alpine`, copy source, run `npm ci && npm run build` (output to `/app/dist`).
2. Final: `nginx:alpine`, copy built files to `/usr/share/nginx/html`, copy a custom `nginx.conf` that:
   - Listens on port 3000.
   - Serves static files.
   - Falls back to `index.html` for SPA routing.
   - Exposes `/health` returning 200 OK.

## Edge Cases
- Debounce or disable the Add Task button while a request is in-flight to prevent duplicate submissions.
- Validate that title is non-empty before submitting.
- Dates should be displayed in the user's local timezone.
- Category filter dropdown should re-fetch categories after a task is added or edited.
